nasb.text: from thirty years and upward, even to fifty years old, all who enter the service to do the work in the tent of meeting.

esv.text: from thirty years old up to fifty years old, all who can come on duty, to do the work in the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 從三十歲以上，直到五十歲，能進來供職，在會幕裡工作的，你都要登記。

ccb.text: 登记三十岁到五十岁、可在会幕司职的男子。
